sections.paragraph:
Afflictions and Adversities Miscellany of minor sub-topics:
- God regulates the measure of afflictions
Psa 80:5; Isa 9:1; Jer 46:28
- Determines the continuance of
Gen 15:14; Num 14:33; Isa 10:25; Jer 29:10
- Does not willingly send
Lam 3:33
- Man is born to
Job 5:7; Job 14:1
- Saints appointed to
1Th 3:3
- Consequent upon the fall
Gen 3:19
- Sin produces
Job 4:8; Job 20:11; Pro 1:31
- Sinners corrected by
2Sa 12:14; Psa 89:32; Isa 57:17; Act 13:11
- Often severe
Job 16:16; Psa 42:7; Psa 66:12; Jon 2:3; Rev 7:14
- Always less than deserved
Ezr 9:13; Psa 103:10
- Results of, good
Gen 50:20; Exo 1:12; Deu 8:16; Jer 24:6; Eze 20:37
- Tempered with mercy
Psa 78:39; Psa 106:46; Isa 30:21; Lam 3:32; Mic 7:9; Nah 1:12
Of Saints:
- To be expected
Joh 16:33; Act 14:22
- Comparatively light
Act 20:24; Rom 8:18; 2Co 4:17
- Temporary
Psa 30:5; Psa 103:9; Isa 54:8; Joh 16:20; 1Pe 1:6; 1Pe 5:10
- Joy under
Job 5:17; Jas 5:11
- End in joy and blessedness
Psa 126:6; Isa 61:3; Mat 5:4; 1Pe 4:14
- Often arise from the profession of the gospel
Mat 24:9; Joh 15:21; 2Ti 3:12
- Exhibit the love and faithfulness of God
Deu 8:5; Psa 119:75; Pro 3:12; 1Co 11:32; Heb 12:7; Rev 3:19
Of the wicked:
- God is glorified in
Exo 14:4; Eze 38:23
- God holds in derision
Psa 37:13; Pro 1:27
- Are multiplied
Deu 31:17; Job 20:5; Job 21:17; Psa 32:10
- Continual
Job 15:20; Ecc 2:23; Isa 32:10
- Often sudden
Psa 73:19; Pro 6:15; Isa 30:13; Rev 18:10
- Are often judicially sent
Job 21:17; Psa 107:17; Jer 30:15
- Are for examples to others
Psa 64:9; Zep 3:7; 1Co 10:5; 1Co 10:11; 2Pe 2:6
- Are ineffectual for their conversion
Exo 9:30; Isa 9:13; Jer 2:30; Hag 2:17
- Their persecution of saints, a cause of
Deu 30:7; Psa 55:19; Zec 2:9; 2Th 1:6
- Impenitence is a cause of
Pro 1:31; Eze 24:13; Amo 4:12; Zec 7:12; Rev 2:22
- Sometimes humble them
1Ki 21:27
- Frequently harden
Neh 9:29; Jer 5:3
- Produce slavish fear
Job 15:24; Psa 73:19; Jer 49:3; Jer 49:5
- Saints should not be alarmed at
Pro 3:26
- Exemplified:
b in Pharaoh and the Egyptians
Exo 9:15; Exo 14:25
b in Ahaziah
2Ki 1:4
b in Gehazi
2Ki 5:27
b in Jehoram
2Ch 21:19
b in Uzziah
2Ch 26:21
b in Ahaz
2Ch 28:8; 2Ch 28:22

- General references

- David
Psa 31:12; Psa 41:9; Psa 88:8; Psa 88:18
- Jesus

- Paul
2Ti 4:16
